news.headline: U.S. Chamber of Commerce and U.S. Customs and Border Protection address fake goods during holidays, amplifying awareness.
news.summary: In New York on December 2, 2024, it was reported that counterfeit goods pose a significant issue, particularly during the holiday season when demand for various items is high. Over the last decade, the U.S. Chamber of Commerce has been raising awareness about the risks and economic consequences associated with counterfeit products. Recently, U.S. Customs and Border Protection joined efforts to amplify the reach of the campaign, emphasizing its significance from a law enforcement standpoint. The cost of counterfeit goods has been a concern, with the full story available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Brent crude futures settle at $71.83/bbl, down 1 cents, 0.01%.
AUGA Group AB received notification from Baltic Champs Group UAB on disposal of voting rights.
news.summary: A notification has been received by AUGA group, AB, under legal entity code 126264360 and ISIN code LT0000127466, from Baltic Champs Group, UAB under legal entity code 145798333, regarding the disposal of voting rights of the Company.

news.headline: Salvation Army hopes for $13.5 million to aid 27 million Americans. Despite challenges, remains optimistic for support.
news.summary: The largest nongovernmental provider of social services in the country is optimistic about receiving generous donations to make up for a shortfall of $13.5 million. Despite facing challenges this giving season, they remain hopeful. This news comes from Alexandria, Va., on December 2, 2024. The holiday season has five fewer days this year, creating a unique challenge.

news.headline: Advancements series airs Dec. 7, 2024, at 8:00 pm ET on Bloomberg Television, showcasing innovative technologies.
news.summary: Discover how revolutionary concepts and cutting-edge technologies are driving success for both corporations and individuals in the current era. Mark your calendars as Advancements with Ted Danson is set to air on Saturday, December 7, 2024, via Bloomberg Television at 8:00 pm ET. This program will showcase the latest innovations and strategies that are reshaping the landscape, ensuring that you stay informed and ahead of the curve in today's rapidly evolving world.

news.headline: Despite SHIB price dropping by 9%, the burn rate has surged by 295%, fueling optimism. SHIB is priced at $0.00002889 with a market cap of $17 billion.
news.summary: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) has experienced a 9% decline, despite a significant increase in its burn rate and transaction volumes, which have sparked optimism regarding its long-term direction. Currently priced at $0.00002889 with a market capitalization of $17 billion, SHIB's 24-hour trend shows a decrease of 9.5% while the 7-day trend reflects an increase of 13.2%. In comparison, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is priced at $0.4177 with a market cap of $61.4 billion, showing a 3.2% decrease in the last 24 hours and a 3.2% increase over the past week. Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) stands at $0.00001993 with a market cap of $8.4 billion, experiencing a 10.9% decline in 24 hours and a 4.3% increase over seven days. Analysts suggest that SHIB could potentially reach $0.0000444 by mid-December, indicating a retracement that may set the stage for a bullish outlook in 2025 if this level is maintained. For more details on this developing story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: AUGA group, AB (legal entity code 126264360, ISIN code LT0000127466) received notification from UAB "Proksima zeta" (legal entity code 306076659) regarding acquisition of voting rights.
news.summary: A notification has been received by AUGA group, AB with legal entity code 126264360 and ISIN code LT0000127466. The notification, sent by UAB "Proksima zeta" with legal entity code 306076659, pertains to the acquisition of voting rights in the Company.

news.headline: NYMEX Natural Gas January futures settle at $3.2130/MMBtu.
NYMEX WTI Crude January futures settle at $68.10 a barrel, up 10 cents, 0.15%.
WelbeHealth opens Carson Center in California to expand PACE access for seniors, focusing on quality care.
news.summary: WelbeHealth, a senior health services provider led by physicians, has recently opened its latest center in Carson, California. This new facility marks WelbeHealth's dedication to increasing access to superior, empathetic healthcare. The opening of the center signifies a significant step in the organization's mission to serve the community.

news.headline: PDI Technologies acquires Comdata Merchant Solutions for growth in truck stop point of sale, Comdata retains fuel card business.
news.summary: Comdata has announced the retention of its fuel card and payment acceptance services for commercial fleets. The company will continue to provide these services, catering to a significant number of clients. PDI Technologies, known for its innovative solutions in the convenience retail and petroleum wholesale industry, will support Comdata in enhancing its offerings. This partnership is expected to benefit a wide range of businesses relying on efficient and secure payment solutions.

news.headline: Consumers Energy avoids 72,000 power outages this year with smart tech, benefiting customers in Michigan.
news.summary: In Jackson, Michigan, as of December 2, 2024, Consumers Energy's implementation of "Automatic Transfer Reclosers" on the state's electric grid has proven to be successful. This investment in smart technology has prevented power outages for more than 72,000 customers.

news.headline: NYMEX Gasoline January futures settle at $1.9172 a gallon.
NYMEX Diesel January futures settle at $2.1777 a gallon.
Plastic industry faces alarming decline amidst climate crisis, signaling larger environmental issues.
BigFuture Scholarships program expanded to Class of 2027. College Board awarded $20M+ to 24,000+ students nationwide.
news.summary: College Board has granted over $20 million in scholarships to over 24,000 students across the country since 2019. In a recent announcement on December 2, 2024, College Board disclosed that it is enhancing its BigFuture® Scholarships initiative to encompass students in the class of 2027. The program's expansion aims to reach more students in need of financial assistance and academic support.

news.headline: AION Partners and Vintage Strategies at Goldman Sachs announce $700M recapitalization for AION 12 Portfolio, partnering to expand workforce housing in the Mid-Atlantic.
news.summary: In New York on December 2, 2024, AION Partners, a prominent real estate owner and operator specializing in workforce multifamily housing, announced a collaboration with Vintage Strategies at Goldman Sachs Alternatives and a global institutional investor for the recapitalization of the AION 12 Portfolio. The portfolio comprises 3,962 properties.

news.headline: Reticulate Micro names Andrew Sheppard as CEO to lead commercial growth with VAST video technology on Dec 2, 2024.
news.summary: In Palm Bay, Florida, on December 2, 2024, Reticulate Micro, Inc. revealed a strategic leadership transition to propel its expansion into commercial sectors. The company is renowned for its cutting-edge VAST (Video Adaptive Systems Technology) platform, which revolutionizes next-generation video technology. This move aims to strengthen the company's foothold in the market and drive growth.

news.headline: Global UEM market to surge by $80.66B (2024-2028) fueled by AI, with CAGR of nearly 57.69%, says Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing the influence of artificial intelligence on market patterns has revealed that the global unified endpoint management (UEM) market is projected to experience significant growth. The market size is anticipated to increase by an estimated USD 80.66 billion between 2024 and 2028. Research conducted by Technavio suggests that the market is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of nearly 57.69% during this period.

news.headline: BGL sells Lillie's Q Sauces & Rubs to OWS Foods for growth. Announced on Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: A leading investment bank, Brown Gibbons Lang & Company (BGL), has recently facilitated the acquisition of Lillie's Q Sauces & Rubs, LLC ("Lillie's Q"), a renowned brand in the high-end barbeque industry. The acquisition, completed on December 2, 2024, marks a significant milestone as Lillie's Q is now under the ownership of OWS Foods, a company known for its quality food products. This strategic move positions Lillie's Q for substantial growth opportunities in the market. With this acquisition, Lillie's Q aims to expand its presence and further establish itself as a leading player in the premium barbeque sector. This development sets the stage for an exciting trajectory ahead for Lillie's Q, as they set their sights on capturing a larger market share and driving increased sales in the near future.

news.headline: Sun Communities, Inc. (NYSE: SUI) to distribute $0.94 per share for Q4 2024 on Jan 15, 2025 to shareholders on record Dec 31.
news.summary: Sun Communities, Inc., a real estate investment trust focusing on manufactured housing and recreational vehicle communities, announced a quarterly distribution of $0.94 per share of common stock for Q4 2024. The distribution will be paid on January 15, 2025, to shareholders of record on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Africa's beauty and personal care market set to grow by $8.18 billion (2024-2028) due to increasing anti-aging demand and AI influences. CAGR of 8.51%.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, it was reported that Artificial Intelligence (AI) is reshaping the market landscape. The beauty and personal care industry in Africa is projected to increase by USD 8.18 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per Technavio. The market is expected to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of approximately 8.51% over the mentioned period.

news.headline: Bechtel opens Riyadh Metro project, first phase of Middle East's largest metro system in Saudi Arabia.
news.summary: A major milestone has been achieved in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, as the BACS Consortium successfully completes the initial phase of constructing the largest metro system in the Middle East. On December 2, 2024, Bechtel announced the official opening of the Riyadh Metro network. This underground railway project, the first of its kind in Saudi Arabia, is set to significantly impact public transportation in the region. The project's completion marks a significant step in enhancing connectivity and mobility for residents.

news.headline: Bernstein: US Ether ETFs may introduce staking soon. ETH deemed a promising investment, with growing investor interest over Bitcoin.
news.summary: According to a leading research firm, Ethereum (ETH) is deemed to be a compelling investment option due to increasing investor attention compared to Bitcoin.

news.headline: Global tonic water market projected to reach USD 3.47 billion by 2031 with 7.1% CAGR, driven by gin demand growth.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, a recent report by The Insight Partners revealed substantial growth in the global Tonic Water Market. The forecast indicates a promising outlook with opportunities for growth and analysis until 2031. This growth is primarily attributed to the rising popularity of gin, driving higher demand.

news.headline: Destination Canada and Air Canada launch "SnOOOw Day," offering 100 Americans round-trip tickets and a fun message generator.
news.summary: Canada is offering a winter getaway to Americans with a special promotion involving round-trip Air Canada tickets and a fun 'Out of Office' message generator. The collaboration between Destination Canada and Air Canada has introduced the "SnOOOw Day" initiative. The promotion, set to start on December 2, 2024, in Vancouver, BC, entails providing nostalgic Americans with a chance to experience the magic of winter in Canada. The initiative aims to boost tourism numbers by offering a unique and whimsical experience to travelers.

news.headline: Maxar wins $290M 5-yr NGA contract for advanced geospatial insights & object detection with precise computer vision models.
news.summary: In Westminster, Colo., Maxar Intelligence, a top geospatial intelligence provider, revealed it secured a significant contract from the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency (NGA). The contract is valued at $290 million and spans five years under an indefinite delivery, indefinite quantity (IDIQ) arrangement known as NGA’s Luno A. Maxar will utilize advanced geospatial insights and automated object detections, tapping into precise computer vision models to ensure the delivery of reliable and automated analysis.

news.headline: Duke Energy Florida's "12 Days of Savings" offers energy efficiency tips to help customers save on electric bills this holiday season.
news.summary: Residents in St. Petersburg, Florida can benefit from cost-effective ways to reduce their electric bills during the holiday season. Duke Energy Florida has introduced the "12 Days of Savings" program in December 2024. This initiative provides a range of simple, low-cost to no-cost energy efficiency suggestions to assist customers in saving money. By following these tips, individuals can effectively manage their energy consumption and potentially see a significant decrease in their electricity expenses.

news.headline: Mesirow advises ID Label Inc. on sale to River Associates; completes 11 packaging, 9 label transactions in past year.
news.summary: Jeff Golman, the Managing Director, and Melanie Yermack, the Managing Director and Co-Head of Packaging, played key roles in overseeing the sale of ID Label to River Associates. This transaction marks Mesirow's eleventh packaging deal in the past year and the ninth label transaction in the same period.

news.headline: Avangrid and PGE partner to build a 120 MWac solar project in Oregon with QTS and Meta, providing clean energy.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, Avangrid, Inc. (NYSE: AGR) and Portland General Electric (PGE) (NYSE: POR) have entered a Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) for Tower Solar. This project, located in Morrow County, Oregon, is a new 120 MWac (166 MWdc) solar energy initiative in partnership with QTS and Meta. The project is currently being constructed and once operational, it will provide sustainable energy to Portland General Electric’s grid through Green Future.

news.headline: $1.9B BTC seized from Silk Road transferred to Coinbase Prime after recent individual theft incident.
news.summary: A wallet holding Bitcoin linked to the 2021 seizure from a person who stole cryptocurrency from the Silk Road marketplace has been relocated.

news.headline: Kao Data partners with CBRE for facility management, supporting European expansion with hyperscale data centers.
news.summary: CBRE has been selected to assist in the expansion of Kao Data's European platform due to its successful history in overseeing hyperscale data center portfolios. CBRE will oversee a range of facilities management services across all of Kao Data's data centers.

news.headline: Life Time Foundation supports better student meals with green onion, enhancing digital resource for healthier options.
news.summary: A digital resource has been recently upgraded to assist schools in replacing unhealthy ingredients with healthier options for free. Based in Chanhassen, Minnesota, the Life Time Foundation, a non-profit organization with 501(c)(3) status, is launching this initiative on December 2, 2024. This effort aims to enhance youth nutrition by providing schools with practical tools for making better food choices.

news.headline: NTT Research and NTT SO Lab present 12 papers at Theory of Cryptography Conference 2024 organized by IACR.
news.summary: NTT Research, Inc., a subsidiary of NTT (TYO:9432) based in Sunnyvale, California, revealed that 11 papers from its Cryptography & Information Security (CIS) Lab and one paper from the NTT Social Informatics Laboratories (SO Lab) in Tokyo, Japan, will be showcased at the Theory of Cryptography Conference (TCC) 2024. The conference, organized by the International Association for Cryptologic Research (IACR), is renowned for investigating paradigms and approaches in the field.

news.headline: Washington Office (W.O.) hires Daniel P. Fata as Senior Advisor and Director, bringing 30 years of experience in national security and defense policy.
news.summary: An emerging technology and national security strategy firm based in Washington, known as Washington Office (W.O.), shared the news today of Daniel P. Fata joining as Senior Advisor and Director of Strategic Services. Fata, with close to 30 years of expertise in defense policy, international relations, and government affairs, has held prominent positions in Congress, the Department of Defense, and the aerospace and defense sector. This addition aims to enhance the firm's leadership team with valuable experience.

news.headline: Millennials embrace diverse investments like stocks, ETFs, focus on personal finance, saving for retirement, managing student loans.
news.summary: Discover the unique approach millennials are taking to invest and prepare for retirement. Recent data shows that this generation is increasingly investing in stocks, ETFs, and focusing on personal finance management. Rather than traditional methods, millennials are also prioritizing paying off student loans as part of their financial strategy. These trends shed light on a new perspective on financial planning for the future.

news.headline: Latest news on Alphabet stock (GOOGL) with quotes and analysis from Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Stay updated on the most recent developments concerning Alphabet, the parent company of Google. Obtain stock quotes, company news, and a detailed chart analysis of the search giant's performance. Read more about Alphabet (GOOGL) Stock in the latest post from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Harris vs. Trump race in 2024 could impact stock market & portfolios. Details on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Explore the potential effects of the Harris vs. Trump showdown in the intensifying Election 2024 race on the stock market and your investment portfolio. Learn how this political battle could influence market trends and decisions for investors. Stay informed to navigate the market changes amid this high-stakes election year.

news.headline: Shopify's Black Friday GMV up 22% to $5 billion, stock falls, in line with last year's growth.
news.summary: On Black Friday, Shopify witnessed a substantial increase in gross merchandise volume, reaching $5 billion, reflecting a 22% rise compared to the previous year. This growth aligns with last year's performance. However, following this announcement, Shopify's stock experienced a decline.

news.headline: Supermicro claims no fraud found in probe - SMCI stock jumps after independent committee finds no evidence.
news.summary: On Monday, shares of SMCI surged following an announcement from Supermicro that an investigation conducted by an independent committee revealed no instances of fraud. This news caused SMCI stock to rise sharply, reflecting investors' optimism in the company's integrity. The report of the investigation's findings contributed to a notable increase in SMCI's stock value, reinforcing market confidence in the company.

news.headline: Global gym management software market to grow by USD 155.3 million (2024-2028) at CAGR of over 10.92%, AI driving market evolution.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the significant impact of AI on market evolution. According to Technavio, the global gym management software market is projected to witness a substantial growth of USD 155.3 million between 2024 and 2028. The market is expected to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) exceeding 10.92% throughout this period.

news.headline: Marc Orloff appointed President, Global Risk Solutions North America at Liberty Mutual Insurance, effective Jan. 1, 2025. Kevin Smith to retire. BOSTON, Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: Kevin Smith, the current President of Global Risk Solutions North America, has revealed his retirement plans. Liberty Mutual Insurance disclosed that Marc Orloff is set to take over as the President of Global Risk Solutions (GRS) North America starting from January 1, 2025. This news was shared on December 2, 2024 in Boston. The transition in leadership marks a significant change within the company, impacting the future direction and operations of GRS North America. Smith's retirement and Orloff's appointment are set to bring fresh perspectives to the business, with the official handover date swiftly approaching.

news.headline: Lowtemp Industries unveils LCD, boosting cannabis extracts packaging efficiency by 800%. Game-changing tech for processors.
news.summary: In Denver on December 2, 2024, Lowtemp Industries introduced the innovative Lowtemp Concentrate Dispenser (LCD), a groundbreaking technology for cannabis and hemp processors creating dabbable concentrates. This device, utilizing no heat, is revolutionizing the industry with its unique design.

news.headline: Global specialty hospitals market to reach USD 1,361.21 billion by 2031 with 13.5% CAGR, per The Insight Partners report.
news.summary: In a recent report by The Insight Partners, it was revealed that the global Specialty Hospitals Market is poised for substantial growth by 2031. This growth is mainly attributed to a surge in public-private partnerships, leading to a rise in market dynamics and recent developments. The report outlines key strategic insights for the market, highlighting the potential for expansion. Specific figures indicate a significant increase in market value and a positive trajectory for the specialty hospitals sector over the next decade.

news.headline: PowerDime and Chintai to start tokenized renewable energy platform. Virtual power purchase agreement market valued at $16.7B in 2023.
news.summary: In 2023, the virtual power purchase agreement market achieved a valuation of approximately $16.7 billion, as reported by Market.US.

news.headline: Mason Capital demands replacement of Grifols' board amid shareholder concerns.
Gildan celebrates listing on NYSE by ringing the opening bell. No specific numbers mentioned.
news.summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) has clarified that it does not promote or support any specific investments, investment strategies, companies, products, or services. This communication was issued to ensure transparency and impartiality in financial dealings. Investors are advised to conduct thorough research before making any decisions related to the stock market. It is essential to note that the NYSE Group is committed to maintaining neutrality and does not provide endorsements. This statement aims to uphold the integrity of the financial industry and protect investors' interests.

news.headline: Eric Church to headline 13th Annual Mack, Jack & McConaughey Gala on April 24 at ACL Live; Tickets on Sale Dec 6.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, it was announced that Eric Church will headline the Mack, Jack & McConaughey (MJ&M) event at ACL Live in Austin, Texas on Thursday, April 24. Tickets for the event will go on sale on December 6 at 10 A.M. CST. Eric Church, a renowned artist with seven ACM Awards, four CMA Awards, and 10 Grammy nominations, is set to deliver an unforgettable performance.

news.headline: Private tutoring market to grow by USD 25.71B (2024-2028) with a CAGR of 10.87%, driven by STEM focus and AI adoption.
news.summary: A recently published report utilizing AI technology predicts significant growth in the global private tutoring market, with an estimated increase of USD 25.71 billion between 2024 and 2028. This growth is anticipated to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.87% over the forecast period.

news.headline: Controversial pardons for financial crimes involving Hunter Biden; making headlines for questionable past acts.
